function.name: edit_file
function.description: Edit a file by replacing exact-match search blocks with new content. SEARCH must match the file character-for-character (whitespace, indentation, line breaks). Include 2-3 lines of unchanged context around each change so the match is unambiguous. To delete text, set replace to ''. Multiple blocks apply in order, top-to-bottom; if any block fails to match, NO changes are written and you get structured feedback you can use to retry on your next turn. Keep each search block under ~30 lines — if a change is larger, split into more blocks or use rewrite_file instead (long blocks risk JSON-output truncation on local models). The file must be covered by config.tools.editAllowlist. Call read_file first to see exact current content.

file_path.description: Path relative to the guild dir; must be allowlisted.

search.description: Exact text to replace. Multi-line OK. Match the file character-for-character including whitespace and indentation.

replace.description: Replacement text. Empty string deletes the matched text.

start_line.description: Optional 1-based line hint when search may match more than once. The matcher restricts its fuzzy search to ±10 lines of the hint.
